blended.narrative: Le Relais is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 3,684 ft. Looking ahead, 25 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Wednesday: 4" of snow, highs of 43°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Thursday: 14" of heavy snow, highs of 29°F. Expect powder.
Saturday: 2.2" of snow, highs of 28°F. Expect variable conditions.
